subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-12-20 in London
subcodes.first_line: There is not one among us who is without hope or desire. The king and beggar alike are afflicted with some sorrow
subcodes.first_line_orig: نفسی بی آمال و آرزو نیست سلطان و گدا هر کس مبتلای غمی است و دوچار مشکلی
subcodes.subjects: @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
